originalTask: any of the vpc peering connections do not have 791259062566 as one of the ends?

input.command:
cat /Users/adrian/.claude/projects/-Users-adrian-IdeaProjects-Soteria/37eccab4-438d-4d0f-ab93-67aad88ccfa7/tool-results/mcp-soteria-neptune-search_vertices-1775495399020.txt | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
text = data[0]['text']
parsed = json.loads(text)
results = parsed['results']
# Check eu-west-2 results (already filtered)
for r in results:
    req = json.loads(r.get('requesterVpcInfo', ['{}'])[0])
    acc = json.loads(r.get('accepterVpcInfo', ['{}'])[0])
    req_owner = req.get('OwnerId','')
    acc_owner = acc.get('OwnerId','')
    if req_owner != '791259062566' and acc_owner != '791259062566':
        pcx = r.get('vpcPeeringConnectionId', [''])[0]
        tags = r.get('tags', [[]])[0]
        name = next((t['Value'] for t in (tags if isinstance(tags, list) else []) if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get('Key') == 'Name'), '(unnamed)')
        print(f'{pcx} | {name} | requester: {req_owner} | accepter: {acc_owner}')
print('---')
# Also check eu-west-1 results
" 2>&1

cat /Users/adrian/.claude/projects/-Users-adrian-IdeaProjects-Soteria/37eccab4-438d-4d0f-ab93-67aad88ccfa7/tool-results/mcp-soteria-neptune-search_vertices-1775495399020.txt | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
text = data[0]['text']
parsed = json.loads(text)
results = parsed['results']
print(f'Total vertices: {len(results)}')
statuses = {}
accounts = {}
for r in results:
    s = r['soteriaStatus'][0]
    statuses[s] = statuses.get(s, 0) + 1
    a = r['accountID'][0]
    accounts[a] = accounts.get(a, 0) + 1
print(f'By status: {statuses}')
print(f'By account:')
for a, c in sorted(accounts.items()):
    print(f'  {a}: {c}')
"

input.command:
cat /Users/adrian/.claude/projects/-Users-adrian-IdeaProjects-Soteria/37eccab4-438d-4d0f-ab93-67aad88ccfa7/tool-results/mcp-soteria-neptune-search_vertices-1775495399020.txt | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
text = data[0]['text']
parsed = json.loads(text)
results = parsed['results']
for r in results:
    pcx = r.get('vpcPeeringConnectionId', [''])[0]
    acct = r.get('accountID', [''])[0]
    tags = r.get('tags', [[]])[0]
    name = ''
    for t in (tags if isinstance(tags, list) else []):
        if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get('Key') == 'Name':
            name = t['Value']
            break
    status_raw = r.get('status', ['{}'])[0]
    try:
        st = json.loads(status_raw).get('Code', '')
    except:
        st = ''
    req = r.get('requesterVpcInfo', ['{}'])[0]
    acc = r.get('accepterVpcInfo', ['{}'])[0]
    try:
        req_p = json.loads(req)
        acc_p = json.loads(acc)
        req_vpc = req_p.get('VpcId','')
        req_owner = req_p.get('OwnerId','')
        req_cidr = req_p.get('CidrBlock','')
        acc_vpc = acc_p.get('VpcId','')
        acc_owner = acc_p.get('OwnerId','')
        acc_cidr = acc_p.get('CidrBlock','')
    except:
        req_vpc = req_owner = req_cidr = acc_vpc = acc_owner = acc_cidr = ''
    print(f'{pcx}|{name}|{st}|{req_owner}:{req_vpc} ({req_cidr})|{acc_owner}:{acc_vpc} ({acc_cidr})')
"
